auth.label: API Key
auth.description: TaxJar API token sent as a Bearer token. Get it from TaxJar under Account > TaxJar API.

actions.name: calculate_sales_tax_for_order
actions.description: Calculate TaxJar sales tax for an order.

from_country.description: Origin country code, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

to_country.description: Destination country code, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

id.description: Unique identifier for this nexus address.

country.description: Country code for the address, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

zip.description: ZIP or postal code for the address.

state.description: State or province for the address.

nexus_addresses.description: Seller nexus addresses to consider for the tax calculation.

quantity.description: Number of units for this line item.

unit_price.description: Price per unit for this line item.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this line item.

product_tax_code.description: TaxJar product tax category code for this item.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for calculating TaxJar sales tax for an order.

tax.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: create_customer
actions.description: Create a TaxJar customer for exemption management.

exemption_type.description: Customer exemption type, such as wholesale, government, non_profit, or other.

country.description: Customer country code, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

id.description: Unique identifier for this nexus address.

country.description: Country code for the address, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

zip.description: ZIP or postal code for the address.

state.description: State or province for the address.

inputSchema.description: TaxJar customer payload.

customer.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: create_order_transaction
actions.description: Create a TaxJar order transaction for reporting and filing.

to_country.description: Destination country code, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

amount.description: Order total including shipping and excluding sales tax.

sales_tax.description: Sales tax collected for the order.

exemption_type.description: Exemption type applied to the order.

id.description: Unique identifier for this nexus address.

country.description: Country code for the address, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

zip.description: ZIP or postal code for the address.

state.description: State or province for the address.

nexus_addresses.description: Seller nexus addresses for the transaction.

quantity.description: Number of units for this line item.

unit_price.description: Price per unit for this line item.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this line item.

sales_tax.description: Sales tax collected for this line item.

product_identifier.description: Product identifier, SKU, or other merchant item code.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a TaxJar order.

order.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: create_refund_transaction
actions.description: Create a TaxJar refund transaction.

transaction_date.description: Refund transaction date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to_country.description: Destination country code, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

quantity.description: Number of units refunded for this line item.

unit_price.description: Price per unit for this refunded line item.

sales_tax.description: Sales tax refunded for this line item.

description.description: Description of this refunded line item.

product_identifier.description: Product identifier, SKU, or other merchant item code.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a TaxJar refund.

refund.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: delete_customer
actions.description: Delete a TaxJar customer by identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a TaxJar customer lookup.

deleted.description: Whether the TaxJar customer delete request succeeded.

customer_id.description: TaxJar customer identifier that was deleted.

response.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: delete_order_transaction
actions.description: Delete a TaxJar order transaction by identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a TaxJar transaction lookup.

deleted.description: Whether the TaxJar transaction delete request succeeded.

transaction_id.description: TaxJar transaction identifier that was deleted.

response.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: delete_refund_transaction
actions.description: Delete a TaxJar refund transaction by identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a TaxJar transaction lookup.

deleted.description: Whether the TaxJar transaction delete request succeeded.

transaction_id.description: TaxJar transaction identifier that was deleted.

response.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: list_customers
actions.description: List TaxJar customer identifiers.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing TaxJar customers.

actions.name: list_nexus_regions
actions.description: List TaxJar nexus regions for the account.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for this TaxJar action.

items.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: list_order_transactions
actions.description: List TaxJar order transaction identifiers within a date range.

from_transaction_date.description: Start transaction date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to_transaction_date.description: End transaction date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

provider.description: Optional source provider filter used by TaxJar.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing TaxJar transactions.

orders.description: Order transaction identifiers returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: list_refund_transactions
actions.description: List TaxJar refund transaction identifiers within a date range.

from_transaction_date.description: Start transaction date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to_transaction_date.description: End transaction date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

provider.description: Optional source provider filter used by TaxJar.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing TaxJar transactions.

refunds.description: Refund transaction identifiers returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: list_tax_categories
actions.description: List TaxJar product tax categories and codes.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for this TaxJar action.

items.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

categories.description: Product tax categories returned by TaxJar.

actions.description: Retrieve a TaxJar refund transaction by identifier.

refund.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: show_tax_rates_for_location
actions.description: Retrieve TaxJar sales tax rates for a location.

zip.description: ZIP or postal code for the location.

country.description: Country code for the location, using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

state.description: State or province for the location.

street.description: Street address for rooftop-level rates when available.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving TaxJar rates for a location.

rate.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.

actions.name: summarize_tax_rates_for_all_regions
actions.description: Retrieve TaxJar minimum and average sales tax rates by region.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for this TaxJar action.

items.description: Raw object payload returned by TaxJar.
